signals.headline: US and Iran Plan Second Round of Ceasefire Talks as Deadline Approaches | NO | HIGH confidence**[1][2][6]
signals.raw:
US and Iran Plan Second Round of Ceasefire Talks as Deadline Approaches | NO | HIGH confidence**[1][2][6]

No ceasefire agreement, resolution, or final announcement has been confirmed today; prior talks in Islamabad ended without a deal, but both sides are now preparing for round two within days, with clearer positions shared and Pakistan pushing to host in Islamabad**[1][2][5][6]**. US officials

signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Advances Toward 150ms Finality | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Advances Toward 150ms Finality | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Alpenglow consensus upgrade for Solana, aiming to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to 150 milliseconds, has passed a governance vote with 98.27% approval, positioning Solana as a top high-speed blockchain amid surging network activity like 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-v

signals.headline: Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair Amid Surging Inflation and Rate Hold | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair Amid Surging Inflation and Rate Hold | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump announced his intent to nominate Kevin Warsh as the next Federal Reserve Chair to replace Jerome Powell, whose term ends in May 2026, as confirmed in recent reports and video discussions.[1][4][5]  
This nomination comes alongside the Fed's Wednesday decision to hold rates

signals.headline: Interactive Brokers Launches SOL Trading for European Investors | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Interactive Brokers Launches SOL Trading for European Investors | YES | MED confidence**  
Interactive Brokers enabled direct Solana (SOL) trading for European users via Zero Hash on April 14, 2026, expanding institutional access despite SOL price compression around $82 and no immediate breakout.[4]
